prestazioni: KJ-ZEM 2.5L V6 Miller-cycle engine: Full internal build with forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 1,000+ hp capability. Pair with a Garrett GTX5533R turbo (0.92 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with 304-grade mandrel bends and a titanium 4-2-1 header from Racing Beat.

Standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom wiring harness by iWire and a dual Bosch 044 fuel pump setup (255 L/hr each) feeding ID1000x injectors. Upgrade to a custom intercooler core by PWR (800x300x100mm) with a 3-inch silicone charge pipe kit from Vibrant Performance and a 45mm HKS SSQV blow-off valve.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way) in the rear, a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel, and a Quaife ATB differential in the front. Replace the stock driveshaft with a carbon fiber unit from Driveshaft Shop (rated for 1,200 Nm) and upgrade to a 6-speed manual transmission with a PPG straight-cut gearset (2.64:1 final drive) and a short shifter from Cusco.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Eunos 800-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Paint in Mazda’s original ‘Montego Blue Mica’ (code 25G) with a 3-stage PPG clearcoat and a custom gold leaf pinstripe by Fikse Design.

OEM+ interior with a full Bride Zeta III seat setup (fixed-back, FIA-approved) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel wrapped in perforated leather. Replace the stock gauge cluster with a Defi Advance BF series 6-gauge pod (boost, oil temp, oil pressure, water temp, fuel pressure, and AFR) and a custom aluminum center console by AutoInk.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV damping, 8/18 adjustment range) and custom-spec Eibach ERS springs (15% stiffer than OEM). Add Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, a full polybush kit from SuperPro (including subframe bushings), and a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +20 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear).
